Inventor from Wilmington creates SMART LUNCH BAG (PLB-430) to easily carry plate of food.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 28, 2025, an inventor from Wilmington, Delaware, shared about the creation of the SMART LUNCH BAG. The innovative lunch bag allows for easy storage and transportation of a plate filled with food. Seeking to simplify the process of transferring items, the inventor aimed to enhance convenience for users. The SMART LUNCH BAG offers a solution to this common issue, ensuring a smoother and more effective way to carry meals.

Indian metals and mining industry set to expand through 2030, with surge in demand for coal, steel, and zinc. Offers crucial role in economic growth, employment, and infrastructure. Mining companies seeking international partnerships for mineral supplies. - ResearchAndMarkets.com
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Metals & Mining Industry in India (2025-2030)" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The metals and mining sector in India is vital for economic growth and industrial progress, playing a significant role in GDP, employment, and infrastructure development. Indian mining firms are actively seeking global partnerships to ensure sustained mineral supplies, indicating the sector's international engagement for the future.

Terraform Labs launches crypto loss claims portal on March 31 for losses over $100. Up to $442.2M estimated to be paid to investors and stakeholders. Court-approved bankruptcy plan follows SEC settlement for $4.47B in June 2024. Do Kwan charged with felonies. Bitcoin lost 37% value in 30 days during Terra ecosystem collapse. US court hearing delayed until April 10 with new evidence under review.
news.summary: Terraform Labs, creator of LUNA and TerraUSD, is launching a crypto loss claims portal on March 31, aiming to reimburse individuals who lost at least $100 due to the Terra ecosystem's collapse in 2022 after a Delaware court's approval for the company to wind down. The court approved Terraform Labs' $4.47 billion bankruptcy plan in June 2024. Claimants must submit documentation through the portal by April 30, with evidence including transaction logs and API keys. The company estimates reimbursing $184.5-$442.2 million. Terraform Labs previously managed a $45 billion ecosystem and faced legal issues, including the arrest of founder Do Kwon. Bitcoin lost 37% in 30 days during the Terra collapse. Kwon's next court hearing is on April 10.

news.headline: Inventors from Wilmington develop snow-clearing system for trailers to prevent accidents. (PLB-425)
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 28, 2025, two inventors from Wilmington, Delaware, shared their experience of encountering a hazardous situation while being driven to a speaking engagement. The incident involved snow falling from the top of a trailer onto their car windshield, potentially posing a threat to them and other drivers on the road. The inventors highlighted the risk and emphasized the importance of finding solutions to prevent such dangers.

XRP price drops by 7% to $2.18, market cap at $127 billion. Whales accumulating amid Ripple's business growth.
news.summary: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) experienced a 7% drop on Friday, trading at $2.18 with a market cap of $127 billion. Despite this decline, large investors are increasing their holdings as Ripple expands its primary operations. Comparatively, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) was priced at $83,775.77 with a market cap of $1.7 trillion, down 3.9% in the past 24 hours but relatively stable over the week with a -0.02% trend. Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) saw a 6.9% decrease, trading at $1,872.65 and holding a market cap of $225.9 billion, with a -4.4% trend over the week. Chart analyst Ali Martinez suggested that a break above $3 for XRP could indicate a shift to bullish momentum by invalidating the head-and-shoulders pattern. For more details, the full report can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Willow acquires Elvie to further innovate maternal health solutions globally, expanding their offerings.
news.summary: San Francisco-based company Willow Innovations, Inc. (Willow) has recently acquired Elvie with the goal of developing a comprehensive global platform that caters to various maternal needs. This move aims to provide a wide range of solutions for mothers worldwide. The acquisition took place on March 28, 2025. Willow is known for transforming the breast pumping industry with its innovative products. The collaboration of Willow and Elvie is poised to create a significant impact in the FemTech industry.

Loci Orthopaedics Ltd participates in 2025 IFSSH and IFSHT Congress in Galway, Ireland. Hosted by American societies, prestigious event gathers global hand care experts.
news.summary: In Galway, Ireland, Loci Orthopaedics Ltd, a clinical stage orthopaedic medical device company, is excited to share its involvement in the renowned Triennial Congress of the International Federation of Societies for Surgery of the Hand (IFSSH) and International Federation of Societies for Hand Therapy (IFSHT). This event, hosted by the American Society for Surgery of the Hand, American Society of Hand Therapists, and American Association for Hand Surgery, is currently held in Galway.

news.headline: 2024 Dodgers World Championship final pitch ball auctioned by Will Smith & wife Cara; proceeds benefit LA fire relief.
news.summary: LA Dodgers catcher Will Smith and his wife, Cara, are auctioning a baseball through the Catching Hope Foundation, with all proceeds going towards Los Angeles fire relief efforts. The auction is in its final week and will end on April 5. The ball can be viewed at the Art of the Game display on the field level behind home plate for the Braves series.
